changelog: Fixed: Requests tab is now visible from EVERY top-level screen (Live TV, Movies, Series, Search, Collection Detail) — not just Home. Single source of truth so any tab added in the future shows up everywhere automatically.
TMDB-only episode rows now pre-fill the request modal with the exact episode you tapped (e.g. 'E04 — The Last Bonanza'), so submitting an unindexed-episode request is one tap.
